allow: Bash(./psql -U postgres -d schoolmanager -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = ''public'' AND table_name ILIKE ''%academic%'';")

Bash(./psql -U postgres -d schoolmanager -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = ''public'' AND \(table_name ILIKE ''%academic%'' OR table_name ILIKE ''%assignment%'' OR table_name ILIKE ''%student%''\);")

Bash(./psql -U postgres -d schoolmanager -c "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema=''public'' AND table_name=''student_assignments'' ORDER BY ordinal_position;")
Bash(./psql -U postgres -d schoolmanager -c "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema=''public'' AND table_name=''academic_years'' ORDER BY ordinal_position;")

Bash(./psql -U postgres -d schoolmanager -c "SELECT a.id, a.student_id, a.academic_year_id, a.is_active, ay.name as academic_year_name FROM student_assignments a LEFT JOIN academic_years ay ON ay.id = a.academic_year_id WHERE a.is_active = true LIMIT 5;")
